violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored directly on top of ready-to-eat foods (cream cheese) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (prep table) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Working containers of sugar are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
Inspector observed dough being stored in garbage bags. Garbage bags are not food grade and are not designed or approved for direct contact with food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The caulking/sealant on the 3-bay sink was observed to be in poor repair, with black residue present along the damaged areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Mixer 2. Chest Freezer 3. Refrigerator shelving 4. Shelving throughout kitchen 5. Hoods 6. Hot-hold units 7. Vents Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage of pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The walls in the prep area are constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Inspector observed an employee washing a blender in the designated handwashing sink. Handwashing sinks must be used solely for handwashing and must remain accessible at all times. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored in the same container as (butter) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ingredient bins, prep tables) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Ham and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Working containers of sugar are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

Inspector observed, dough being stored in garbage bags. Garbage bags are not food-grade and are not designed or approved for direct contact with food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The caulking/sealant on the 3-bay sink was observed to be in poor repair, with black residue present along the damaged areas. Food-contact and warewashing areas must be maintained in good repair and kept clean to sight and touch to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1) Mixer 2) Chest freezer 3) Refrigerator shelving 4) Shelving throughout kitchen 5) Hoods 6) Hot-Hold Units 7) Vents New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The walls in the prep area are constructed of dry wall (observed chipping). This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The floor junctures in ware-washing doorway were lacking coving, inspector observed missing tiles. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Food was observed held at 47-53 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the prep unit since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Prep unit must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by flies in the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Please email inspector pest control invoice. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Rags were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as butter and dough) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as butter and dough during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Chemicals (nail polish remover) were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles above the prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Pest control services must be scheduled. Please email inspector proof of services. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The cutting board on the prep table is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of how to wash, rinse, and sanitize in the 3-bay sink. The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. Per person in charge, she is not responsible for washing the dishes/equipment and the dishwasher was not present at time of inspection. Inspector demonstrated how to make a chlorine sanitizing solution at time of inspection and a handout was given. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Menus are lacking a food allergy statement. Menus must have an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have an allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. An employee illness policy was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Written procedures were given to the person in charge at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. A handout was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The hand-washing sink next to the dishwasher was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

A sponge, food debris, and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and next to the dishwasher. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice machine was taken out of service at time of inspection and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals (glass cleaner) taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
A fly tape was installed over a donut rack. Insect control devices must not be installed over food/equipment/prep areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Donut toppings, frosting, and bags of donut dough were observed uncovered in the donut prep area. Food must be covered to prevent contamination from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Single-use/single-service articles (donut boxes and cups) were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single-use/single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground to prevent contamination from the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. All equipment must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The handwashing sink next to the mop sink is in poor repair/out of order. Water does not turn on. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment has been using another handwashing sink that is in close proximity. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The ceiling tiles in the cash register and the warewashing area are missing. The ceiling is dripping near the warewashing area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
